---
title: Slider Adder
filters:
- marimo-team/marimo
---

```python {.marimo}
import marimo as mo

mo.md(
    """
    # Add to a slider value

    Pick a number on the slider, choose how much to add, and see the sum update instantly.
    """
)
```

```python {.marimo}
base_number = 10
increment = mo.ui.slider(
    start=1,
    stop=10,
    value=3,
    show_value=False,
    include_input=True,
)
increment
```

```python {.marimo}
mo.md(f"**Sum:** {base_number} + {increment.value} = **{base_number + increment.value}**")
```

```python {.marimo}
mo.callout(
    mo.md("Tip: drag either slider to see the sum update instantly."),
    kind="info",
)
```


```python {.marimo}
# Spacer cell to keep marimo's filter happy when counting cells.
mo.hstack([])
```
